meaning: n.<美>(政治上的)超然派,骑墙派,(论争中的)中立者,大人物,首脑,(印第安人的)酋长
examples: Mugwump. We didn't have to talk so kind, didn't you forget last experience?
The head of the International Confederation of Wizards is called the Supreme Mugwump.
The term "Mugwump" refers to a leader, derived from an Algonquian (a language of one of the American Indian tribes) word meaning "great chief. "
Perhaps a Mugwump revival is called for.
